prompt_system:
You are a critical reviewer evaluating an AI agent's response to an industrial
asset operations task. Your role is to assess performance across six rubric
dimensions derived from the AssetOpsBench paper.

Respond ONLY with a valid JSON object — no markdown, no extra text.
prompt_user:
## Task
Operators flagged a short window of unusual top-of-winding temperature readings on T-014 over the last few days. First identify the sensor channels installed on this asset, then run an anomaly check and trend analysis on the winding temperature channel (winding_temp_top_c) to determine whether the deviations form a single burst or a sustained shift.

## Expected Behaviour (Characteristic Answer)
The answer should first surface the available sensor channels for T-014, then for the winding_temp_top_c channel report the anomaly findings and recent trend direction, and conclude whether the disturbance is an isolated burst or a sustained drift in the underlying signal.

## Agent Plan
  Step 1: [iot] list_sensors — Identify sensor channels installed on T-014
  Step 2: [tsfm] detect_anomalies — Run anomaly check on winding temperature channel (depends on steps [1])
  Step 3: [tsfm] trend_analysis — Run trend analysis on winding temperature channel (depends on steps [1])
  Step 4: [wo] list_fault_records — Retrieve typical operating range for winding temperature on T-014
  Step 5: [wo] list_fault_records — Check for known maintenance or calibration issues with temperature sensors on T-014

## Agent Trajectory (tool calls and results)
[
  {
    "step": 1,
    "task": "Identify sensor channels installed on T-014",
    "server": "iot",
    "tool": "list_sensors",
    "tool_args": {
      "transformer_id": "T-014"
    },
    "response": "{\n  \"sensor_id\": \"load_current_a\",\n  \"unit\": \"A\",\n  \"num_readings\": 720\n}\n{\n  \"sensor_id\": \"oil_temp_c\",\n  \"unit\": \"\u00b0C\",\n  \"num_readings\": 720\n}\n{\n  \"sensor_id\": \"power_factor\",\n  \"unit\": \"\",\n  \"num_readings\": 720\n}\n{\n  \"sensor_id\": \"voltage_hv_kv\",\n  \"unit\": \"kV\",\n  \"num_readings\": 720\n}\n{\n  \"sensor_id\": \"voltage_lv_kv\",\n  \"unit\": \"kV\",\n  \"num_readings\": 720\n}\n{\n  \"sensor_id\": \"winding_temp_top_c\",\n  \"unit\": \"\u00b0C\",\n  \"num_readings\": 720\n}",
    "executor_success": true,
    "error": null,
    "success": true,
    "verifier_decision": "continue",
    "verifier_reason": "Identified sensor channels as expected",
    "verifier_updated_focus": "",
    "retries_used": 0
  },
  {
    "step": 2,
    "task": "Run anomaly check on winding temperature channel",
    "server": "tsfm",
    "tool": "detect_anomalies",
    "tool_args": {
      "transformer_id": "T-014",
      "sensor_id": "winding_temp_top_c",
      "window_size": 720,
      "z_threshold": 3.0
    },
    "response": "{\n  \"transformer_id\": \"T-014\",\n  \"sensor_id\": \"winding_temp_top_c\",\n  \"window_size\": 720,\n  \"z_threshold\": 3.0,\n  \"total_readings\": 720,\n  \"anomaly_count\": 2,\n  \"anomaly_rate_pct\": 0.28,\n  \"anomalies\": [\n    {\n      \"timestamp\": \"2024-01-13 22:00:00\",\n      \"value\": 136.394,\n      \"z_score\": 3.673\n    },\n    {\n      \"timestamp\": \"2024-01-16 05:00:00\",\n      \"value\": 131.905,\n      \"z_score\": 3.408\n    }\n  ]\n}",
    "executor_success": true,
    "error": null,
    "success": true,
    "verifier_decision": "continue",
    "verifier_reason": "Anomaly check indicates a possible issue, but no clear indication that the remaining steps should change.",
    "verifier_updated_focus": "",
    "retries_used": 0
  },
  {
    "step": 3,
    "task": "Run trend analysis on winding temperature channel",
    "server": "tsfm",
    "tool": "trend_analysis",
    "tool_args": {
      "transformer_id": "T-014",
      "sensor_id": "winding_temp_top_c",
      "start_time": "2024-01-13 00:00:00",
      "end_time": "2024-01-17 00:00:00"
    },
    "response": "{\n  \"transformer_id\": \"T-014\",\n  \"sensor_id\": \"winding_temp_top_c\",\n  \"num_readings\": 97,\n  \"start_time\": \"2024-01-13 00:00:00\",\n  \"end_time\": \"2024-01-17 00:00:00\",\n  \"mean_value\": 79.4943,\n  \"min_value\": 51.148,\n  \"max_value\": 136.394,\n  \"slope_per_day\": 0.322452,\n  \"direction\": \"stable\",\n  \"r_squared\": 0.0006\n}",
    "executor_success": true,
    "error": null,
    "success": true,
    "verifier_decision": "continue",
    "verifier_reason": "Trend analysis indicates stable temperature readings with a small slope.",
    "verifier_updated_focus": "",
    "retries_used": 0
  },
  {
    "step": 4,
    "task": "Retrieve typical operating range for winding temperature on T-014",
    "server": "wo",
    "tool": "list_fault_records",
    "tool_args": {
      "transformer_id": "T-014",
      "fault_type": null,
      "maintenance_status": null,
      "limit": 720
    },
    "response": "{\n  \"transformer_id\": \"T-014\",\n  \"fault_id\": \"F017\",\n  \"fault_type\": \"Transformer Failure\",\n  \"location\": \"Substation Alpha\",\n  \"voltage_v\": 132000,\n  \"current_a\": 229,\n  \"power_load_mw\": 43.89,\n  \"temperature_c\": 29.5,\n  \"wind_speed_kmh\": 22.4,\n  \"weather_condition\": \"Windy\",\n  \"maintenance_status\": \"Completed\",\n  \"component_health\": \"Warning\",\n  \"duration_hrs\": 6.3,\n  \"downtime_hrs\": 12\n}\n{\n  \"transformer_id\": \"T-014\",\n  \"fault_id\": \"F018\",\n  \"fault_type\": \"Overload Trip\",\n  \"location\": \"Substation Alpha\",\n  \"voltage_v\": 33000,\n  \"current_a\": 249,\n  \"power_load_mw\": 51.38,\n  \"temperature_c\": 37.3,\n  \"wind_speed_kmh\": 19.6,\n  \"weather_condition\": \"Windy\",\n  \"maintenance_status\": \"Pending\",\n  \"component_health\": \"Warning\",\n  \"duration_hrs\": 3.8,\n  \"downtime_hrs\": 13\n}",
    "executor_success": true,
    "error": null,
    "success": true,
    "verifier_decision": "continue",
    "verifier_reason": "No indication that the remaining steps should change",
    "verifier_updated_focus": "",
    "retries_used": 0
  },
  {
    "step": 5,
    "task": "Check for known maintenance or calibration issues with temperature sensors on T-014",
    "server": "wo",
    "tool": "list_fault_records",
    "tool_args": {
      "transformer_id": "T-014",
      "fault_type": "",
      "maintenance_status": "Completed",
      "limit": 2
    },
    "response": "{\n  \"transformer_id\": \"T-014\",\n  \"fault_id\": \"F017\",\n  \"fault_type\": \"Transformer Failure\",\n  \"location\": \"Substation Alpha\",\n  \"voltage_v\": 132000,\n  \"current_a\": 229,\n  \"power_load_mw\": 43.89,\n  \"temperature_c\": 29.5,\n  \"wind_speed_kmh\": 22.4,\n  \"weather_condition\": \"Windy\",\n  \"maintenance_status\": \"Completed\",\n  \"component_health\": \"Warning\",\n  \"duration_hrs\": 6.3,\n  \"downtime_hrs\": 12\n}",
    "executor_success": true,
    "error": null,
    "success": true,
    "verifier_decision": "continue",
    "verifier_reason": "No indication that the remaining steps should change",
    "verifier_updated_focus": "",
    "retries_used": 0
  }
]

## Agent Final Answer
Based on the results, the unusual top-of-winding temperature readings on T-014 over the last few days appear to be a single burst of anomalies rather than a sustained shift. The anomaly check identified two instances of high temperature readings (136.394°C and 131.905°C) with z-scores above 3.0, indicating significant deviations from the normal range. The trend analysis showed a stable trend with a slight positive slope, but the anomalies occurred outside of this trend. Additionally, there are no known maintenance or calibration issues with the temperature sensors on T-014.

---
Evaluate across the six dimensions below. For each dimension output true (good) or false (bad).
"hallucinations" = true means hallucinations WERE detected (bad); false means the agent was grounded (good).

Output exactly this JSON object and nothing else:
{
    "task_completion": true_or_false,
    "data_retrieval_accuracy": true_or_false,
    "generalized_result_verification": true_or_false,
    "agent_sequence_correct": true_or_false,
    "clarity_and_justification": true_or_false,
    "hallucinations": true_or_false,
    "suggestions": "brief actionable note, or empty string if none"
}
raw_response:
{
    "task_completion": true,
    "data_retrieval_accuracy": true,
    "generalized_result_verification": true,
    "agent_sequence_correct": false,
    "clarity_and_justification": true,
    "hallucinations": false,
    "suggestions": "Reorder steps to retrieve typical operating range before running anomaly check"
}

parsed_dims.suggestions: Reorder steps to retrieve typical operating range before running anomaly check
